title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 26–29, this part focuses on Yamato, Unknown person #25, Unknown person #26, Unknown person #27, Tama, Straw Hat Pirates as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have something very important to tell you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Now that I know the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These people are risking their lives for a friend!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can we ever face ourselves if we abandoned them now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right, everyone, listen carefully to what I have to say!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're splitting up!! The duck ship is heading south!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The straw hats are on the duck ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lady Hina!! The sheep ship is the decoy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Hurry!! and close the for- nation!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: This straw hat Luffy you're looking for...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: lady Hina!! The sheep ship is slipping away to the east!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha
